label: Transparent orchid motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated white and magenta orchid flower motif, clearly readable as an orchid, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A refined white and magenta orchid bloom with broad petal-white outer petals, vivid orchid-magenta throat and lip, delicate fuchsia veining, subtle shadow-plum depth inside natural petal folds, and a short stem/leaf-green base accent kept visually distinct from the background color.
Composition/framing: centered complete flower cutout with generous padding on all sides; full bloom visible without cropping; short stem base may appear but no pot or vase.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves petal white form, magenta saturation, botanical structure, crisp silhouette edges, and natural orchid anatomy.
Chroma-key workflow: generate on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background, copy the exact generated source to .source/motif-chroma.png, then remove the key with remove_chroma_key.py using auto-key border, soft matte, and despill. The final motif.png is RGBA transparent with transparent corners. The green key did not require switching to #ff00ff.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no shadow, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no greenhouse background, no pot, no vase, no second flower, no insects.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board, high-resolution source artwork
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive high-resolution 16:9 light-mode design-system board for a theme named "Morphous Orchid" / "Orchid", derived from the visible white and magenta orchid cutout reference.
Reference image role: the transparent orchid motif is the source of truth for palette, texture, contrast, rhythm, and visual motifs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Orchid, Orchid, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Sidebar, Product App Preview, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Charts, Status States, Texture/Pattern, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette: petal white, orchid magenta, lip fuchsia, shadow plum, deep plum ink, greenhouse/stem green, cream neutrals, blush petal, pollen gold only as a tiny focus color. Show swatches with readable hex-style labels.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance with readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric; include short legible Japanese UI labels.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, navigation/sidebar, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, and texture/pattern samples.
Design mood: refined luxury product system, premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, precise grid, quiet cream/petal surfaces, 8px card radius, slim greenhouse dividers, delicate petal-vein line texture, magenta action states, stem green secondary accents, shadow-plum depth.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include exact title "Morphous Orchid" and display name "Orchid". No long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Orchid" or "Orchid", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board, high-resolution source artwork
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode version of the visible "Morphous Orchid" light design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference image roles: the transparent white and magenta orchid cutout is the palette and motif source; the light-mode Morphous Orchid board is the layout, component coverage, naming, spacing, and system-language reference.
Required visible sections: Morphous Orchid, Orchid, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Sidebar, Product App Preview, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Charts, Status States, Texture/Pattern, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette translation: deep shadow plum and near-black plum surfaces, petal white text and elevated surfaces, orchid magenta primary actions, lip fuchsia highlights, greenhouse/stem green secondary accents, cream neutrals as restrained contrast, pollen gold only as a tiny focus color.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance with readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric; include short legible Japanese UI labels.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, navigation/sidebar, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, and texture/pattern samples.
Design mood: refined luxury product app system, premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dark UI, precise grid, luminous magenta action states, slim greenhouse dividers, subtle petal-vein overlays, dark plum depth, readable petal-white text, greenhouse green support accents.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include exact title "Morphous Orchid", display name "Orchid", and label "Dark Mode". No long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Orchid" or "Orchid".
